form.formComment: Has finished fourth at the last two runs, both at Gawler, the latest when beaten 9 lengths behind Carry On Natasha over 400m. Is a danger.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when second (19.87) at big odds over 342m at Angle Park. Drawn close to the inside. Solid top-three prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when second (19.87) at big odds over 342m at Angle Park. Drawn close to the inside. Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 6 length fifth (23.16) at Gawler. Previous form sound including a win three back at Murray Bridge Straight. Looks tested and others preferred this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when a 6 length fifth (23.16) at Gawler. Previous form sound including a win three back at Murray Bridge Straight. Looks tested and others preferred this time.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd on April 10 over 395m at this track behind Zipping Rove beaten 2.5 lengths (22.44) in a Grade 5. Although unsuccessful last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with her.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd on April 10 over 395m at this track behind Zipping Rove beaten 2.5 lengths (22.44) in a Grade 5. Although unsuccessful last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with her.

form.formComment: Comes off a (19.32) win last time, scoring by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 5 over 350m at Murray Bridge Straight. Goes very well off the draw boasting four wins and two places from 10 starts. Leading player.

form.formComment: Finished fourth (16.70) last start at this track. Prior to that had recorded three minor placings in a row. Drawn out wide and needs to find best form to feature.
